Powering the
Machine Economy

Build DePINs for energy, mobility, connectivity, and more.

Start building

Trusted by

The home of DePIN ‍

Meet the apps soon to launch on peaq

Slide 4 of 9.

Silencio

Over 900,000 people across 180+ countries are using the Silencio app to monitor noise pollution from their phones.

900K+

"Silencio is transforming the way we think about – and act on – noise pollution. The project is growing fast, and peaq’s scalability and cost-efficiency are crucial in enabling that."

Theo Messerer

Co-Founder of Silencio

Teneo

4,000,000+ people from 190 countries have set up Teneo Community Nodes to crowdsource social media data.

4M+ Nodes

"Teneo’s Community Nodes gather real-time social data with the power of DePIN, and peaq’s scalability and Modular DePIN Functions made it the perfect choice for this rapidly-growing network."

Leroy Hofer

Co-Founder of Teneo Protocol

MapMetrics

65,000 drives from more than 167 countries use MapMetrics for navigation, reporting 41,000+ traffic updates per day.

600K+

“MapMetrics is a drive-to-earn DePIN leveraging Web3 to build a community-powered alternative to Web2 navigation apps. peaq’s vast network of partners and solid fundamentals make it the perfect layer-1 chain for that.”

Brent van der Heiden

Co-Founder of MapMetrics

Farmsent

160,000+ farmers in Asia and South America are already leveraging Farmsent to gain more control over their produce and its distribution.

160K+

“The food trade system is broken, and Web3 is the cure that it so badly needs. Farmsent and DePIN give farmers all they need to break free from centralized corporations, and peaq, with its Modular DePIN Functions and tokenomics, is perfect for Farmsent.”

Yog Shrusti

Co-Founder of Farmsent

DATS

More than 600,000+ unique users from 190+ countries have joined DATS to build a safer and more resilient internet.

600K+

"DATS is changing the cybersecurity game, enabling people to provide bandwidth and CPU cores for pentesting and vulnerability detection. peaq’s Modular DePIN Functions and powerful fundamentals enable us to build and scale at the speed of the most advanced threats."

Serkan Bilen

Co-Founder of DATS

Bistroo

More than 149,000 people already use Bistroo to order food, totalling $11,000,000 worth of orders in 2024.

149K+

The Web2 food delivery industry is broken, harming both restaurants and consumers. Bistroo’s DePIN solves this by aligning everyone’s incentives. Bistroo is building a future-ready SaaS-based e-commerce ecosystem. peaq’s versatility and extensive Web3 interoperability will help the project scale internationally.

Bob Dohmen

Co-Founder of Bistroo

YOM

30+ studios are already building games on YOM's Web3 platform counting more than 20,000 in-app users.

20K+

“YOM is here to disrupt cloud gaming, enabling gaming rig owners to earn rewards from their pcs while enabling gamers to play AAA quality games on a basic PC or mobile. peaq is the perfect home for a project like us thanks to its massive scalability and Modular DePIN Functions, which give us tons more flexibility to scale fast.”

Andy Pringle

CEO of YOM

aZen Protocol

The aZen DePIN already features more than 80,000 devices with a combined RAM of 128,000 GB.

80K+

“aZen is on a mission to make universal computing the new standard for cloud, edge and endpoint environments — a tectonic shift like moving to Web3 from Web2. peaq’s Modular DePIN Functions and impressive network of enterprise collaborations make it the ideal home for a project like ours.”

‍

Dr. Felix Xia

Founder of aZen Protocol

DeNet

With over 3,000,000 Storage users & Watcher Nodes and 9 PB of RWA storage, DeNet has secured 14 million files.

3M+

"DeNet is turning everyday PC and smartphone users into storage providers and validators, creating the most secure storage network ever. Within peaq’s ecosystem of DePINs and enterprises, we have an exceptional opportunity to revolutionize the future of data storage.”

Rafik Singatullin

Co-Founder of DeNet

In numbers

The world's largest and fastest-growing DePIN ecosystem

$3B+

Total value of devices on DePINs on peaq

6,000,000+

Machines, vehicles, robots, and devices

50+

DePINs building on peaq network

22

Industries being shaped by DePINs on peaq

Why does the world need peaq?

Super Decentralized

peaq has a Nakamoto Coefficient of 130+. The highest among major Layer-0 and Layer-1 blockchains.

Super Scalable

peaq will scale past 100,000 transactions per second by leveraging Elastic Scaling and Agile Core Time.

Super Green

The peaq network is engineered using the most environmentally-friendly blockchain architecture in Web3.

Modular DePIN Functions

peaq provides ready-to-use modular functions to power and tokenize vehicles, robots, and devices on any DePIN.
